requirement_topic.en: EMC Conformity — GEOSTM (GS) Standards for Radio and Wireless Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容合规——GEOSTM（GS）无线电及无线设备标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容合規——GEOSTM（GS）無線電及無線裝置標準

summary.en: Wireless and radio devices placed on the Georgian market must comply with electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements under GEOSTM (Georgian Standards and Metrology Institute — საქართველოს სტანდარტებისა და მეტროლოგიის ეროვნული სააგენტო) Georgian Standards (GS). GEOSTM is the national standards body and metrology authority. Many GS standards are adopted from ISO, IEC, and ETSI European Norms; under the EU Association Agreement (DCFTA), Georgia is progressively adopting EN standards, including EN 55032 (emissions), EN 55035 (immunity), and ETSI EN 301 489 series for radio equipment EMC. Conformity assessment to GS/EN standards may be performed by accredited testing laboratories recognised by GEOSTM. Test reports must be submitted as part of the GNCC type approval application. The GS standard series for radio and telecom equipment EMC serves as the technical baseline alongside the GNCC regulatory process. Georgian Mkhedruli-script labelling and markings may be required on conformity documentation and product packaging.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的无线电及无线设备，须符合GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚标准与计量研究院——საქართველოს სტანდარტებისა და მეტროლოგიის ეროვნული სააგენტო）格鲁吉亚标准（GS）规定的电磁兼容（EMC）要求。GEOSTM是国家标准化机构和计量主管机构。许多GS标准采纳自ISO、IEC及ETSI欧洲标准；依据欧盟联系协议（DCFTA），格鲁吉亚正逐步采纳EN标准，包括EN 55032（发射）、EN 55035（抗扰）及无线电设备EMC适用的ETSI EN 301 489系列。对GS/EN标准的合格评定可由GEOSTM认可的认证测试实验室执行。测试报告须作为GNCC型号核准申请文件的组成部分提交。无线电及电信设备EMC的GS标准系列与GNCC监管程序共同构成技术基准。合格评定文件及产品包装可能须采用格鲁吉亚Mkhedruli字符标注及标识。
summary.zht: 投放喬治亞市場的無線電及無線裝置，須符合GEOSTM（喬治亞標準與計量研究院——საქართველოს სტანდარტებისა და მეტროლოგიის ეროვნული სააგენტო）喬治亞標準（GS）規定的電磁相容（EMC）要求。GEOSTM是國家標準化機構和計量主管機構。許多GS標準採納自ISO、IEC及ETSI歐洲標準；依據歐盟聯繫協議（DCFTA），喬治亞正逐步採納EN標準，包括EN 55032（發射）、EN 55035（抗擾）及無線電設備EMC適用的ETSI EN 301 489系列。對GS/EN標準的合格評定可由GEOSTM認可的認證測試實驗室執行。測試報告須作為GNCC型號核准申請文件的組成部分提交。無線電及電信設備EMC的GS標準系列與GNCC監管程序共同構成技術基準。合格評定文件及產品包裝可能須採用喬治亞Mkhedruli字符標注及標識。

standards_or_laws: GEOSTM GS standards (Georgian Standards) — national standards adopted from ISO/IEC/ETSI, including GS EN 55032 (EMC emissions for multimedia equipment), GS EN 55035 (EMC immunity), and GS ETSI EN 301 489 series (EMC for radio equipment)
EU Association Agreement / DCFTA (in force 2016) — drives progressive adoption of EN standards including EN EMC directives
Electronic Communications Law of Georgia (2005, as amended) — references technical standards for equipment placed on the Georgian market
GNCC technical requirements for type approval — test reports against GS/EN standards required as part of conformity application

summary.en: Chinese wireless and radio devices must comply with EMC requirements under GB (Guobiao) national standards, including GB/T 9254 series (radiated and conducted emissions for IT equipment), GB/T 17626 series (immunity), and SRRC technical requirements for radio equipment. EMC testing is required as part of CCC certification (for in-scope products) and SRRC type approval. Chinese GB EMC standards are based on CISPR and IEC standards but may differ in limit values, test methods, or scope from GEOSTM GS standards. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not directly recognised by GEOSTM or GNCC and do not substitute for GS/EN-based test reports.
summary.zh: 中国无线电及无线设备须符合GB（国标）国家标准规定的电磁兼容要求，包括GB/T 9254系列（信息技术设备辐射及传导发射）、GB/T 17626系列（抗扰）以及SRRC无线电设备技术要求。EMC测试是CCC认证（适用范围内产品）和SRRC型号核准的必要组成部分。中国GB EMC标准以CISPR和IEC标准为基础，但限值、测试方法或适用范围可能与GEOSTM GS标准存在差异。中国CCC EMC测试报告不被GEOSTM或GNCC直接承认，不可替代基于GS/EN标准的测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國無線電及無線裝置須符合GB（國標）國家標準規定的電磁相容要求，包括GB/T 9254系列（資訊技術設備輻射及傳導發射）、GB/T 17626系列（抗擾）以及SRRC無線電設備技術要求。EMC測試是CCC認證（適用範圍內產品）和SRRC型號核准的必要組成部分。中國GB EMC標準以CISPR和IEC標準為基礎，但限值、測試方法或適用範圍可能與GEOSTM GS標準存在差異。中國CCC EMC測試報告不被GEOSTM或GNCC直接承認，不可替代基於GS/EN標準的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 series — China national standard for radiated and conducted emissions for information technology equipment (based on CISPR 22/32)
GB/T 17626 series — China national standard for EMC immunity (based on IEC 61000-4 series)
SRRC technical requirements for radio equipment — EMC and radio performance requirements for type approval in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes EMC testing for in-scope product categories

gap.en: Chinese CCC and SRRC EMC test reports based on GB standards are not recognised by GEOSTM or GNCC. Separate EMC testing against GS/EN standards (EN 55032, EN 55035, ETSI EN 301 489 series) by a laboratory recognised by GEOSTM or an accredited EN-standard laboratory is required for GNCC type approval in Georgia. While Georgia's DCFTA alignment means EN/ETSI-based test reports from accredited EU or internationally recognised laboratories are generally accepted as technical evidence, retesting against GB standards only will not suffice. Chinese exporters should obtain EN/ETSI-aligned EMC test reports from internationally accredited laboratories to support the GNCC application. GB-to-EN limit value differences, particularly in conducted emissions and immunity levels, may require product modifications.
gap.zh: 基于GB标准的中国CCC和SRRC EMC测试报告不被GEOSTM或GNCC承认。须由GEOSTM认可或经认可EN标准实验室按GS/EN标准（EN 55032、EN 55035、ETSI EN 301 489系列）进行单独EMC测试，作为格鲁吉亚GNCC型号核准的支持文件。虽然格鲁吉亚DCFTA接轨意味着来自经认可欧盟或国际认可实验室的EN/ETSI标准测试报告通常可作技术证据被接受，但仅依据GB标准进行重测将不满足要求。中国出口商应从国际认可实验室取得符合EN/ETSI的EMC测试报告，以支持GNCC申请。GB与EN限值差异，尤其在传导发射和抗扰度方面，可能需要对产品进行改动。
gap.zht: 基於GB標準的中國CCC和SRRC EMC測試報告不被GEOSTM或GNCC承認。須由GEOSTM認可或經認可EN標準實驗室按GS/EN標準（EN 55032、EN 55035、ETSI EN 301 489系列）進行單獨EMC測試，作為喬治亞GNCC型號核准的支持文件。雖然喬治亞DCFTA接軌意味著來自經認可歐盟或國際認可實驗室的EN/ETSI標準測試報告通常可作技術證據被接受，但僅依據GB標準進行重測將不滿足要求。中國出口商應從國際認可實驗室取得符合EN/ETSI的EMC測試報告，以支持GNCC申請。GB與EN限值差異，尤其在傳導發射和抗擾度方面，可能需要對產品進行改動。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity against GS/EN standards required as part of GNCC type approval for radio and wireless devices in Georgia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC conformity against GB standards required as part of SRRC type approval and CCC certification for in-scope products in China

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian Standards and Metrology Institute (საქართველოს სტანდარტებისა და მეტროლოგიის ეროვნული სააგენტო)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity against GEOSTM GS/EN standards is mandatory for wireless and radio devices entering Georgia. Chinese CCC and SRRC EMC test reports based on GB standards are not recognised. EN/ETSI-aligned EMC test reports from accredited laboratories must be submitted as part of the GNCC type approval application. GB-to-EN limit value differences may require product modifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合GEOSTM GS/EN标准的电磁兼容合规对进入格鲁吉亚的无线电及无线设备为强制要求。基于GB标准的中国CCC和SRRC EMC测试报告不被承认。须将符合EN/ETSI的经认可实验室EMC测试报告作为GNCC型号核准申请文件提交。GB与EN限值差异可能需要对产品进行改动。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合GEOSTM GS/EN標準的電磁相容合規對進入喬治亞的無線電及無線裝置為強制要求。基於GB標準的中國CCC和SRRC EMC測試報告不被承認。須將符合EN/ETSI的經認可實驗室EMC測試報告作為GNCC型號核准申請文件提交。GB與EN限值差異可能需要對產品進行改動。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum and Frequency Authorisation — GNCC Frequency Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱及频率授权——GNCC频率协调
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜及頻率授權——GNCC頻率協調

summary.en: Radio devices operating in Georgia must use frequency bands authorised under Georgia's national frequency allocation plan, administered by GNCC. GNCC manages radio spectrum under the Electronic Communications Law of Georgia and issues spectrum use authorisations (licences) where required. Certain frequency bands used by devices lawfully sold in China — particularly some sub-GHz IoT bands (e.g. 433 MHz, 868 MHz) and 5 GHz Wi-Fi channels — may have different availability or power limit designations in Georgia. Devices using 5 GHz Wi-Fi (UNII-2 and UNII-2e bands, 5.25–5.725 GHz) generally require DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) and TPC (Transmit Power Control) functions consistent with ETSI/EN 301 893, as Georgia aligns with EU spectrum regulations under the DCFTA. LTE and 5G cellular bands used in China may differ from bands deployed in Georgia; devices must support the bands used by Georgian operators. GNCC frequency authorisations or notifications must be obtained where required before devices are placed on the market.
summary.zh: 在格鲁吉亚运营的无线电设备须使用由GNCC管理的格鲁吉亚国家频率分配计划所批准的频段。GNCC依据《格鲁吉亚电子通信法》管理无线电频谱，并在必要时颁发频谱使用授权（许可证）。在中国合法销售的设备所使用的某些频段——尤其是部分低于1GHz的物联网频段（如433MHz、868MHz）及5GHz Wi-Fi信道——在格鲁吉亚可能具有不同的可用性或功率限制规定。使用5GHz Wi-Fi（UNII-2及UNII-2e频段，5.25–5.725GHz）的设备通常须具备符合ETSI/EN 301 893的DFS（动态频率选择）和TPC（发射功率控制）功能，因为格鲁吉亚依据DCFTA与欧盟频谱法规接轨。中国使用的LTE和5G蜂窝频段可能与格鲁吉亚部署的频段不同；设备须支持格鲁吉亚运营商使用的频段。须在产品上市前取得GNCC频率授权或通知（如有要求）。
summary.zht: 在喬治亞運營的無線電設備須使用由GNCC管理的喬治亞國家頻率分配計畫所批准的頻段。GNCC依據《喬治亞電子通信法》管理無線電頻譜，並在必要時頒發頻譜使用授權（許可證）。在中國合法銷售的設備所使用的某些頻段——尤其是部分低於1GHz的物聯網頻段（如433MHz、868MHz）及5GHz Wi-Fi通道——在喬治亞可能具有不同的可用性或功率限制規定。使用5GHz Wi-Fi（UNII-2及UNII-2e頻段，5.25–5.725GHz）的設備通常須具備符合ETSI/EN 301 893的DFS（動態頻率選擇）和TPC（發射功率控制）功能，因為喬治亞依據DCFTA與歐盟頻譜法規接軌。中國使用的LTE和5G蜂窩頻段可能與喬治亞部署的頻段不同；設備須支援喬治亞運營商使用的頻段。須在產品上市前取得GNCC頻率授權或通知（如有要求）。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Law of Georgia (2005, as amended) — GNCC authority over radio spectrum allocation and frequency use authorisation
GNCC National Frequency Allocation Plan — defines permitted frequency bands and power limits for radio devices in Georgia
ETSI EN 301 893 — 5 GHz RLAN standard (DFS/TPC requirements); adopted as GS standard under DCFTA alignment
ETSI EN 300 328 — 2.4 GHz RLAN/WLAN standard; adopted as GS standard under DCFTA alignment

summary.en: In China, radio frequency allocations are managed by MIIT and SRRC under the Radio Regulation of China. Chinese devices must comply with SRRC frequency and power limits, which may differ from Georgian GNCC allocations. For example, 5 GHz Wi-Fi channel availability and power limits differ between China (SRRC) and Georgia (EU-aligned ETSI). Sub-GHz IoT frequency bands (433 MHz, 470 MHz, 868 MHz) have different allocations in China versus Georgia. Chinese SRRC type approval documents specify the frequency bands and power levels approved for the Chinese market only and are not valid for Georgia.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电频率分配由工业和信息化部和SRRC依据《中华人民共和国无线电管理条例》进行管理。中国设备须符合SRRC频率和功率限制，这些限制可能与格鲁吉亚GNCC分配不同。例如，5GHz Wi-Fi信道可用性和功率限制在中国（SRRC）和格鲁吉亚（与欧盟ETSI接轨）之间存在差异。低于1GHz的物联网频段（433MHz、470MHz、868MHz）在中国与格鲁吉亚的分配不同。中国SRRC型号核准文件所列频段和功率电平仅适用于中国市场，在格鲁吉亚无效。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電頻率分配由工業和信息化部和SRRC依據《中華人民共和國無線電管理條例》進行管理。中國設備須符合SRRC頻率和功率限制，這些限制可能與喬治亞GNCC分配不同。例如，5GHz Wi-Fi通道可用性和功率限制在中國（SRRC）和喬治亞（與歐盟ETSI接軌）之間存在差異。低於1GHz的物聯網頻段（433MHz、470MHz、868MHz）在中國與喬治亞的分配不同。中國SRRC型號核准文件所列頻段和功率電平僅適用於中國市場，在喬治亞無效。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulation of the People's Republic of China (MIIT/SRRC) — national frequency allocation and radio device use authorisation in China
SRRC Radio Type Approval — frequency-specific approval for radio transmission equipment; China-market only
MIIT frequency allocation plan — defines permitted bands and power limits for China; differs from Georgian GNCC plan

gap.en: Radio frequency bands and power limits authorised by SRRC for the Chinese market may not correspond to those permitted by GNCC in Georgia. Devices designed for Chinese frequency plans may require hardware or firmware modifications for Georgian use, particularly for 5 GHz Wi-Fi (DFS/TPC compliance with ETSI EN 301 893), sub-GHz IoT bands, and cellular band support matching Georgian operators. Chinese exporters must verify that the device's radio parameters (frequency bands, output power, channel plan) comply with GNCC's national frequency allocation plan and EU-aligned ETSI standards adopted by GEOSTM. SRRC approval documents are not transferable to Georgia and do not satisfy GNCC frequency authorisation requirements.
gap.zh: SRRC为中国市场批准的无线电频段和功率限制，可能与GNCC在格鲁吉亚允许的频段和限制不对应。针对中国频率方案设计的设备，可能需要进行硬件或固件改动以适应格鲁吉亚使用，尤其是5GHz Wi-Fi（ETSI EN 301 893 DFS/TPC合规）、低于1GHz的物联网频段，以及支持格鲁吉亚运营商频段的蜂窝频段。中国出口商须核实设备无线电参数（频段、输出功率、信道计划）是否符合GNCC国家频率分配计划及GEOSTM采纳的EU接轨ETSI标准。SRRC核准文件不可转用于格鲁吉亚，不满足GNCC频率授权要求。
gap.zht: SRRC為中國市場批准的無線電頻段和功率限制，可能與GNCC在喬治亞允許的頻段和限制不對應。針對中國頻率方案設計的設備，可能需要進行硬件或韌體改動以適應喬治亞使用，尤其是5GHz Wi-Fi（ETSI EN 301 893 DFS/TPC合規）、低於1GHz的物聯網頻段，以及支援喬治亞運營商頻段的蜂窩頻段。中國出口商須核實設備無線電參數（頻段、輸出功率、通道計畫）是否符合GNCC國家頻率分配計畫及GEOSTM採納的EU接軌ETSI標準。SRRC核准文件不可轉用於喬治亞，不滿足GNCC頻率授權要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — devices must operate within GNCC-authorised frequency bands; spectrum use authorisation required where applicable before market placement in Georgia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval specifies approved frequency bands and power limits for China-market radio devices

source.publisher: GNCC — Georgian National Communications Commission (საქართველოს კომუნიკაციების ეროვნული კომისია)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Radio devices for Georgia must operate within GNCC-authorised frequency bands aligned with EU/ETSI spectrum regulations under the DCFTA. Chinese SRRC-approved frequency parameters may not match Georgian requirements. 5 GHz Wi-Fi devices must implement DFS/TPC per ETSI EN 301 893. Sub-GHz IoT band allocations differ; cellular band compatibility with Georgian operators must be verified. Hardware or firmware modifications may be required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚无线电设备须在GNCC批准的频段内运行，该频段依据DCFTA与欧盟/ETSI频谱法规接轨。中国SRRC核准的频率参数可能与格鲁吉亚要求不符。5GHz Wi-Fi设备须按ETSI EN 301 893实施DFS/TPC。低于1GHz物联网频段分配存在差异；须核实与格鲁吉亚运营商的蜂窝频段兼容性。可能需要进行硬件或固件改动。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞無線電設備須在GNCC批准的頻段內運行，該頻段依據DCFTA與歐盟/ETSI頻譜法規接軌。中國SRRC核准的頻率參數可能與喬治亞要求不符。5GHz Wi-Fi設備須按ETSI EN 301 893實施DFS/TPC。低於1GHz物聯網頻段分配存在差異；須核實與喬治亞運營商的蜂窩頻段相容性。可能需要進行硬件或韌體改動。
